case_title: GUO CAI ZHOU VS. BRANDI ALEXANDRA LANDROY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHOU, GUO CAI AS TO DEFENDANT LANDROY, BRANDI ALEXANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LANDROY, BRANDI ALEXANDRA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHOU, GUO CAI AS TO DEFENDANT LANDROY, BRANDI ALEXANDRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LANDROY, BRANDI ALEXANDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY ANGELA WU AS CANTONESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHOU, GUO CAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDROY, BRANDI ALEXANDRA $1,905.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,970.00, $1705 FOR MEDICAL BILLS BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY CONCERNING PAIN. THE COURT ALSO AWARDS $200 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE BASED ON PHOTOS OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. THE COURT DENIES RECOVERY FOR THE REPAIRS LISTED IN PLAINTIFF'S ESTIMATE BECAUSE THE ESTIMATE WAS OBTAINED LONG AFTER THE ACCIDENT AND THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT THIS LOW-SPEED ACCIDENT CAUSED EXTENSIVE DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
